short_summary: Kathryn Christine Cammack ( KAM-ak; born February 16, 1988) is an American politician serving as the U.S. representative for Florida's 3rd congressional district. A member of the Republican Party, Cammack previously served as deputy chief of staff to her predecessor, Representative Ted Yoho, who retired in 2020. Her congressional district covers a twelve-county area that includes much of North Central Florida.
